variantNotes: All blocks map to existing block names and style variants. No new block directories needed. Cards (icon) is a CSS style variant within the cards block. Columns (promo) is a CSS style variant within the columns block. Accordion-faq is a standalone block.

sectionMetadata.reason: Hero block handles its own background image styling (full-width photo). No section-metadata needed.

sequences.description: Full-width marquee image of woman on phone with centered heading 'Choose your way to pay' and subtext 'Make individual auto loan payments or set it and forget it with automatic payments.'
sequences.reason: Full-width background image with text overlay requires hero block structure. Cannot be achieved with default content authoring.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Auto loan payment options' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. The decorative line above is a CSS concern (can be styled via section first-child heading pseudo-element).

sequences.description: Tabbed/selectable content with 3 payment methods (Online, Phone, Mail), each with icon and description. Online: enroll in online banking description + Get started CTA. Phone: automated system info + phone number 1-800-289-8004. Mail: check/money order instructions + mailing address.
sequences.reason: Structured repeating content with icons representing 3 payment methods. While the original has tab switching behavior, the static content structure matches Cards (icon) which displays items with small icons and text. Each payment method has an icon, title, and descriptive text. No tabs block exists in this project.
sequences.note: The original page uses a tabbed interface but since no tabs block exists, Cards (icon) is the best available match for structured content with icons. The 3 payment methods will display as a grid of icon cards.

sectionMetadata.reason: Gold/yellow background provides section container styling for the promotional columns content. The background is a solid accent color with visible padding, not block-specific design.

sequences.description: Promotional banner with image of woman on left side, heading 'Autopay lets you focus on what matters', paragraph about Autopay debiting monthly from checking/savings account, and 'Sign on' CTA button on right side
sequences.reason: Side-by-side layout with image on left and promotional text content with CTA on right. Requires structured layout that matches Columns (promo) variant - a 2-column promotional layout.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Related questions' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Four expandable question-and-answer pairs: 'Can I make my car payment in advance?', 'How do I set up, change, or cancel automatic loan payments?', 'How do I change my payment due date?', 'Where can I find my payoff amount for my auto loan?'
sequences.reason: Interactive expandable/collapsible FAQ content requires block decoration. Matches the accordion-faq block exactly.

sequences.description: Centered secondary button 'Review all FAQs' linking to /help/loans/auto-loans-faqs/
sequences.reason: Author types a link. The button styling is applied via CSS to links (EDS auto-decorates links as buttons).

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Customer support' with decorative line above
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Grid of 3 items, each with small icon (64x64) on gold gradient, heading, description text, and action link. Items: 'Help with auto loan payments' (Learn more link to /auto-loans/assist/), 'Auto financing' (Let's go link to /auto-loans/vehicle-financing-101/), 'Call us' (phone 1-800-289-8004 with Mon-Sat hours)
sequences.reason: Repeating structured pattern of items with small icons, headings, descriptions, and action links. Matches Cards (icon) variant which displays small icon images with text content.
sequences.note: Same Cards (icon) variant as Section 2. Icon cards with action links at the bottom of each card.

sequences.description: Numbered footnotes: '1. Availability may be affected by your mobile carrier's coverage area...' and '2. Terms and conditions apply...' followed by document codes QSR-12062026-8049532.1.1 and LRC-0925
sequences.reason: Author types footnote text as small paragraphs. Standard text content that does not require any block structure.

hero.description: Block with background image and overlaid text content. Structure: first row has picture element for background, then heading/paragraph content as subsequent elements.
hero.structure: Row 1: picture (background image) | Row 2: h2 heading, paragraph text
hero.note: Existing hero block in project. Used for full-width marquee with background image and centered text.

cards (icon).description: Grid of card items. Each row in block table has 2 columns: icon image in col 1, text content (heading + description + optional link) in col 2. Style variant 'icon' applies small icon sizing (64px).
cards (icon).structure: Each row: Column 1 = icon image | Column 2 = heading + paragraph + optional link
cards (icon).note: Existing Cards variant. Block table header: 'Cards (icon)'. Used in Section 2 (payment options) and Section 5 (customer support).

columns (promo).description: Side-by-side layout with promotional content. Two columns with image on one side and text content on other. Style variant 'promo' adds promotional styling.
columns (promo).structure: Row 1: Column 1 = image | Column 2 = heading + paragraph + CTA link
columns (promo).note: Existing Columns variant. Block table header: 'Columns (promo)'. Used in Section 3 (Autopay promotional banner).

accordion-faq.description: Expandable FAQ items. Each row in block table represents one Q&A pair: question text in col 1, answer text in col 2.
accordion-faq.structure: Each row: Column 1 = question text | Column 2 = answer text (can include rich content: paragraphs, lists, links)
accordion-faq.note: Existing accordion-faq block in project. Used in Section 4 (Related questions).

section1.background: Full-width photo of woman on phone - this is a hero-specific background image, not section styling
section1.layout: Edge-to-edge, no visible section padding - content overlays on image
section1.reason: Background is the hero block's own design (full-width photo with text overlay). Hero blocks typically have intrinsic backgrounds.

section3.background: Solid gold/yellow accent color (#fdb714) with visible section padding
section3.layout: Content centered with visible padding around the columns block
section3.reason: Section provides container styling (gold background) for the columns block. The gold color is section-level, not block-intrinsic.

metadata.title: How to make car payments and pay your Wells Fargo auto loan | Wells Fargo
metadata.description: Wells Fargo makes paying your auto loan easy from automatic payments to paying online, over the phone, or in person. Pay your way with Wells Fargo.
metadata.keywords: pay auto loan, pay car loan, how to make car payments, how do you make a car payment, how to pay my car payment
